product.title: Product & Architecture
product.heading: Platform & Architecture
product.overview.title: System Overview
product.overview.desc: Centralis operates on a multi-tenancy SaaS model. This ensures that while multiple organizations use the same underlying infrastructure, each company's data is strictly isolated and secure.
product.ecosystem.title: The Ecosystem
product.ecosystem.desc: Our platform is a unified mobile application:
product.ecosystem.webPanel: Manager Mobile App: The same mobile app grants Managers elevated permissions to configure company settings, schedule events, broadcast announcements, and manage departmental channels.
product.ecosystem.mobileApp: Employee Mobile App: All employees use the same mobile application to access company news, participate in internal chat, view their event calendar, and RSVP securely.
product.roles.title: Role Management
product.roles.desc: Access control is central to the platform. The Manager role has elevated permissions to administer data isolated by their specific company_id. Employees have tailored access to view announcements, participate in chats, and RSVP to events securely within their organizational environment.
helpCenter.title: Help Center & FAQ
helpCenter.heading: Help Center
helpCenter.subtitle: Frequently asked questions about Centralis.
helpCenter.faq1.q: How is my company's data privacy maintained?
helpCenter.faq1.a: Centralis utilizes a strict Multi-tenancy isolation architecture. Each organization is assigned a unique identifier (company_id) ensuring that your data is logically separated and inaccessible by any other tenant on the platform.
helpCenter.faq2.q: How does the internal chat work?
helpCenter.faq2.a: Centralis provides a secure internal chat where all employees within the same company can communicate in real time. Conversations are fully isolated by company, ensuring privacy and confidentiality.
helpCenter.faq3.q: What permissions does the Manager role have?
helpCenter.faq3.a: Managers have full administrative control over their company's workspace. They can invite employees, create official announcements, manage the corporate event calendar, and configure company settings.
helpCenter.faq4.q: On which mobile devices is Centralis available?
helpCenter.faq4.a: Centralis is available as a fully-featured Native Mobile Application for both iOS and Android, designed for all users to stay connected anywhere.
